meta.note: valid_posts uses discovered ids and non-empty POST bodies when bearer is set; OUTBOUND_CAPTURE_MUTATIONS=1 is optional for extra writes. createbag may return success with bag_id 0 — see valid_bag_id_available.

entries.note: Skipped by default (OUTBOUND_SKIP_CREATEBAG=1). The live createbag endpoint often returns status success with bag_id 0 even for invalid or incomplete payloads, so HTTP capture is misleading. Set OUTBOUND_SKIP_CREATEBAG=0 to record the real response body.
